name: &YT&yhe &YL&yegendary &YC&yastle of &YT&yhe &YG&yods&n
description:
&n   You stand at the entrance of an awesome castle... then, you realize that it
must be the &YLegendary Castle of the &BMighty Gods of &RWardome&n! It sure is the most
wonderful building you've ever saw...
&n   You may enter the castle by going north of here, or you may return to the
&RNew Market Square&n by going down.

exits.description: This exit will take you to New Market Square.
